description: This file defines the Java entity class 'LoanApplicationDraft' used for persisting loan application drafts in a database. It includes fields for JSON payloads, status, risk scores, decisions, timestamps, and versioning, supporting multi-step wizard saves and state management for loan applications.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraft
classes.description: Entity class representing a loan application draft, including metadata, JSON data payload, status, risk assessment, decision info, timestamps, and concurrency control.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID identifier of the loan application draft.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID identifier of the loan application draft.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the user associated with this draft.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the user associated with this draft.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Returns the JSON payload string representing the draft data.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Sets the JSON payload string representing the draft data.

methods.name: getSectionStatus
methods.description: Returns the JSON string mapping section statuses.

methods.name: setSectionStatus
methods.description: Sets the JSON string mapping section statuses.

methods.name: getCurrentStep
methods.description: Returns the current step the user is on during the drafting process.

methods.name: setCurrentStep
methods.description: Sets the current step in the multi-step loan application process.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the overall status of the draft (e.g., in progress, completed).

methods.name: setStatus
methods.description: Sets the overall status of the draft.

methods.name: getRiskScore
methods.description: Returns the computed risk score for the draft, null if not yet scored.

methods.name: setRiskScore
methods.description: Sets the computed risk score for the draft.

methods.name: getDecision
methods.description: Returns the automated decision outcome for the draft.

methods.name: setDecision
methods.description: Sets the automated decision outcome.

methods.name: getDecisionReason
methods.description: Returns the human-readable reason for the decision.

methods.name: setDecisionReason
methods.description: Sets the reason for the decision.

methods.name: getDecisionedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the decision was made.

methods.name: setDecisionedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the decision was made.

methods.name: getSubmittedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the draft was submitted.

methods.name: setSubmittedAt
methods.description: Sets the submission timestamp.

methods.name: getVersion
methods.description: Returns the version number for optimistic locking.

methods.name: setVersion
methods.description: Sets the version number for concurrency control.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the creation timestamp of the draft.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the creation timestamp.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the last update timestamp.

methods.name: setUpdatedAt
methods.description: Sets the last update timestamp.
